description: Constitutional rights police must inform suspects of before custodial interrogation (5th/6th Amendment)
rights: anything said can be used in court
if can't afford attorney, one will be appointed
when_required: Only during custodial interrogation — not during arrest, traffic stops, or spontaneous statements
if_not_read: Statements made in violation are inadmissible; arrest is still valid

copyright: Automatic protection for original creative works; life of author + 70 years; no registration required
patent: Exclusive right to invention for 20 years; requires USPTO registration; must be novel, non-obvious, useful
trademark: Protects brand identifiers (names, logos); indefinite duration with continued use; ® for registered, ™ unregistered
trade_secret: Confidential business information; protected indefinitely as long as secret; no registration
fair_use: Limited use of copyrighted material for commentary, criticism, education, parody — 4-factor test

writing_requirement: Statute of Frauds: real estate, contracts >1 year, goods >$500 must be in writing
verbal_contracts: Generally enforceable but hard to prove; written always preferred

at_will: Most US states: employer or employee can end relationship for any legal reason without notice
protected_classes: Race, color, religion, sex, national origin (Title VII), age 40+ (ADEA), disability (ADA), pregnancy (PDA)
FMLA: 12 weeks unpaid job-protected leave for qualifying medical/family reasons (50+ employee companies)
wage_theft: Minimum wage violations, unpaid overtime, tip stealing — report to DOL
non_compete: Enforceability varies by state; FTC 2024 rule banning most non-competes (legal challenges pending)
whistleblower: Various protections for reporting violations; retaliation prohibited

tenant_rights: habitable living conditions (implied warranty of habitability)
privacy (24-48 hours notice before entry in most states)
security deposit return within state-specified timeframe
eviction_process: Notice → Court filing → Hearing → Writ of possession; 'self-help' eviction illegal in all states
security_deposit: Document unit condition on move-in/out; keep evidence; small claims court for disputes
lease_breaking: Early termination: may owe remainder or reletting fee; domestic violence exceptions in many states

description: Simplified court process for resolving disputes involving modest sums without an attorney

key_laws.FCRA: Fair Credit Reporting Act — right to dispute errors; free annual credit reports

key_laws.FDCPA: Fair Debt Collection Practices Act — prohibits harassment by debt collectors

key_laws.TILA: Truth in Lending Act — requires APR disclosure

lemon_law: New car defects: 3-4 repair attempts or 30 days out of service in first 1-2 years
chargeback: Credit card dispute for undelivered goods, fraud, or misrepresentation — 60-120 day window
FTC_role: Enforces consumer protection; file complaints at ReportFraud.ftc.gov
